Primary Request and Intent:\n   The session covered three main tasks:\n   - **Phase 16.6**: Add disk-persistent caching to the lexical search index (`lexical-indexer.js`) to avoid rebuilding from scratch on every context-assembly call\n   - **Phase 17**: Build three active learning scripts (`memory-updater.js`, `cost-analyzer.js`, `vault-auditor.js`) plus orchestrator integration and validator\n   - **Framework health check**: Verify the entire App Builder framework is running correctly before starting a new project — all tests passing, Docker/Chroma operational, Vault indexed, stale chunk IDs resolved\n   \n   The user's ultimate goal is to move on to building an actual project using the App Builder framework.\n\n2. Key Technical Concepts:\n   - **FlexSearch 0.7.31**: In-memory keyword search index. `export()` is asynchronous (fires callbacks via chained `setTimeout`s); must resolve promise when last chunk key (`ctx`) arrives, not immediately after calling `export()`\n   - **Vault fingerprinting**: Compute sorted list of `relpath:mtime:size` for all .md files to detect when cache should be invalidated\n   - **Disk cache pattern**: `.claude/cache/lexical/` stores `meta.json` (fingerprint), `docs.json` (docs array), `index.json` (FlexSearch serialized chunks)\n   - **Memory-updater staged write pattern**: Never write `memory.yaml` directly; write `memory-pending-<ISO-timestamp>.yaml` for human review, apply with `--apply <ts>`\n   - **80/20 rolling baseline**: `new_baseline = 0.8 * current + 0.2 * new_score`\n   - **Regression detection**: `current_baseline - new_score > 10` flags a regression\n   - **3× median spike detection**: For even-length arrays: `(costs[Math.floor((n-1)/2)] + costs[Math.ceil((n-1)/2)]) / 2`\n   - **Chroma v2 API**: `/api/v1/` endpoints are deprecated; v2 uses `/api/v2/heartbeat` and `/api/v2/tenants/default_tenant/databases/default_database/collections`\n   - **Subagent-driven development**: Fresh subagent per task with two-stage review (spec compliance + code quality) after each\n   - **CommonJS module exports**: Must destructure — `const { MemoryUpdater } = require('./memory-updater')` not `const MemoryUpdater = require('./memory-updater')`\n\n3. Files and Code Sections:\n\n   - **`.claude/scripts/lexical-indexer.js`** (modified)\n     - Added `loadOrBuildIndex(vaultDir, {forceRebuild, log})` as primary entry point\n     - Added `vaultFingerprint(vaultDir)` — computes sorted mtimes fingerprint\n     - Added `saveIndex(docs, index, fingerprint)` / `loadIndex(fingerprint)` — disk I/O at `.claude/cache/lexical/`\n     - Critical fix for async FlexSearch export:\n     ```javascript\n     function _exportIndex(index) {\n       return new Promise(resolve => {\n         const chunks = {};\n         index.export((key, data) => {\n           chunks[key] = data;\n           if (key === 'ctx') resolve(chunks); // 'ctx' is always last of 4 chunks\n         });\n       });\n     }\n     ```\n     - Exports: `{ loadVaultDocs, buildIndex, searchDocs, loadOrBuildIndex, saveIndex, loadIndex, vaultFingerprint }`\n\n   - **`.claude/scripts/context-assembly.js`** (modified)\n     - Changed require: `const { loadOrBuildIndex, searchDocs } = require('./lexical-indexer');`\n     - Changed build block from `loadVaultDocs()` + `buildIndex()` to `await loadOrBuildIndex(VAULT_DIR, { log })`\n\n   - **`.claude/scripts/memory-updater.js`** (created)\n     - Key exports: `{ MemoryUpdater, computeNewBaselines, detectRegressions }`\n     - `computeNewBaselines(current, incoming)`: `result[key] = 0.8 * current[key] + 0.2 * incoming[key]`\n     - `detectRegressions(currentBaselines, newScores)`: returns keys where `currentBaselines[key] - newScores[key] > 10`\n     - `MemoryUpdater.recordOutcome({agent, domain, scores})`: reads `memory.yaml`, writes `memory-pending-<ts>.yaml` with `_pending_meta` block including regression annotations like `⚠️ REGRESSION: compliance dropped from 90.0 to 75`\n     - `apply(timestamp)`: strips `_pending_meta`, overwrites `memory.yaml`, validates `data.score_baselines` exists first\n     - Defensive: yaml.load() in try-catch, `scores[k] ?? 'N/A'` guard\n\n   - **`.claude/scripts/cost-analyzer.js`** (created)\n     - Key exports: `{ CostAnalyzer, detectSpikes }`\n     - `detectSpikes(records)`: groups by `agent_role`, computes proper median, flags cost > 3× median; adds `medianCost` and `multiple` fields\n     - Fixed median for even-length arrays: `(costs[Math.floor((costs.length - 1) / 2)] + costs[Math.ceil((costs.length - 1) / 2)]) / 2`\n     - `CostAnalyzer.loadAllRecords()`: reads `.claude/metrics/*/v1.0.0/outputs.json`\n     - `CostAnalyzer.buildReport(records, {days, agent})`: aggregates totalCost, byAgent (with median/average), byDomain, byDay, spikes\n     - `CostAnalyzer.formatReport(report, date)`: markdown with Summary, Per-Agent table, Per-Domain table, Daily Spend, Spikes section\n     - CLI: `--agent`, `--days`, `--no-write`\n\n   - **`.claude/scripts/vault-auditor.js`** (created)\n     - Key export: `{ VaultAuditor }`\n     - `checkStaleDocs(now)`: uses `last_updated` frontmatter (NOT filesystem mtime), skips files without `last_updated`, returns relative paths\n     - `checkMissingStatus()`: checks `Vault/10-Known-Problems/*.md` for `status:` field\n     - `checkUnreferencedAdrs()`: reads `Vault/07-Decisions/` filenames, checks if basename appears in any `Vault/11-Facts/` file content\n     - Errors and Fixes:\n   - **FlexSearch export async bug**: Initial `_exportIndex` resolved promise immediately after calling `export()`, before setTimeout callbacks fired. Fixed by resolving when `key === 'ctx'` (the last of 4 chunks).\n   - **`MemoryUpdater is not a constructor`**: Subagent wrote `const MemoryUpdater = require('./memory-updater')` which assigns the whole module object `{ MemoryUpdater, computeNewBaselines, detectRegressions }`. Fixed manually with Edit tool to `const { MemoryUpdater } = require('./memory-updater')`. This caused Phase 13 tests to fail with 9/10 failures until fixed.\n   - **Median calculation bug in cost-analyzer**: `costs[Math.floor(costs.length / 2)]` is wrong for even-length arrays. Fixed to `(costs[Math.floor((costs.length - 1) / 2)] + costs[Math.ceil((costs.length - 1) / 2)]) / 2`.\n   - **JSDoc `*/` in comment**: `metrics/*/v1.0.0/` in a block comment caused Node.js v24 to prematurely close the comment. Subagent changed to `metrics/{agent}/v1.0.0/`.\n   - **js-yaml missing from node_modules**: Was listed as a dependency but not installed. Subagent ran `npm install` to fix it.\n   - **Test-generated pending files**: Running the validator produced 50+ `memory-pending-*.yaml` files across agent dirs. Cleaned up manually and added to `.gitignore`.\n   - **`git rm --cached Vault/14-Agent-Memory/`**: Accidentally unstaged tracked memory.yaml files when trying to clean pending files. Re-added with `git add`.\n   - **doctor.js Chroma v1 API**: `npm run doctor` fails because Chroma deprecated v1 API. Container is running fine (confirmed via direct curl to v2 endpoints). Not yet fixed — was in progress when summary was requested.\n\n5. Problem Solving:\n   - **Disk cache invalidation**: Used vault fingerprint (sorted mtimes of all .md files) instead of a manifest. Fast (stat-only, no file reads), automatically invalidates when any doc changes.\n   - **Memory write governance**: Staged pending-file pattern satisfies \"memory writes are never automatic\" requirement without needing the existing score-based `approval-workflow.js` (which wasn't designed for this use case).\n   - **Chroma v2 detection**: Confirmed Chroma is actually running and healthy via direct curl; the issue is only in doctor.js checking deprecated endpoints.\n\n6.
